metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by nhangen — Obsidian integration and token analytics

plugins.name: obsidian
plugins.description: Obsidian vault integration for Claude Code. Auto-capture git commits, save sessions, query past work with /recall, export conversations.

plugins.name: token-scope
plugins.description: Token spend analytics and cost alerts for Claude Code. 10 report modes, tooling analysis by layer, auto-checkpoint hook for session cost control.
